arguments.final_answer:
Added input validation to createUser endpoint:
- Created src/validators/userValidator.ts with checks for name (non-empty, max 100), email (regex pattern), age (integer 0-150)
- Updated handler to return 400 with field-specific error messages on validation failure
- Fixed TypeScript compilation error by using Record<string, unknown> instead of custom interface
- All tests pass
